Trader Identity

Who Is This Trader?

📅 The Patient Swing Trader (Swing)
Diagnostic Verdict
Mean Reversion – buying dips and selling peaks within tight ranges

You thrive on quick, high-frequency option plays, hunting for small, consistent gains by exploiting mean-reversion patterns. Your discipline in timing gives you a 71.6% win rate, yet your hand-holding on losing positions and overtrading erode the edge.

Where You Are Good

Edge Verification
Low-F/Low-T Wins

Low fundamental and technical bias signals a re-entry zone; news confirms momentum reversal.

Best sectors Retailing, Finance Term Lending
Evidence: Pattern: Low F + Low T + Low Total + NEWS – 179 trades, 69.77% win rate, avg PnL ₹1,238.84
To Leverage Further: Reinforce this pattern systematically.
Sector Super-Performers

These sectors have predictable intraday volatility and liquidity, matching your mean-reversion style.

Best sectors Retailing, Finance Term Lending
Evidence: Retailing – 58 trades, 75.86% win rate, avg PnL ₹1,166.59; Finance Term Lending – 5 trades, 60% win rate, avg PnL ₹182.50
To Leverage Further: Reinforce this pattern systematically.
Profit Factor & Overall PnL

Your win/loss ratio and average win size (~₹1,567) outweigh losses (~₹1,357).

Evidence: Profit factor 2.9, total PnL ₹642,491.2, 71.6% win rate
To Leverage Further: Reinforce this pattern systematically.

Where You Are Losing Money

Leakage Diagnostic
Overtrading

61 overtrading days, avg 21.3 trades/day, max 60 trades/day

Evidence: High trade volume dilutes capital and increases transaction costs.
Surgical Fix: Cap trades to 30 per day and enforce a 2-hour break after 20 trades.
Revenge & Loss Averaging

85 revenge trades, 154 loss-averaging events, zero paid-off count

Evidence: You double down on losing positions, often still open.
Surgical Fix: Implement a strict stop-loss (1.5% of entry) and close all losing legs before adding.
FOMO Trading

293 fomo trades, 33.37% of total

Evidence: Entries during rapid runs without consolidation lead to low win rates (17.88% on high-volume news patterns).
Surgical Fix: Adopt a pre-trade checklist: confirm consolidation, set a 2-minute pause before entry.
High-F/High-T Risk

Patterns with High F + High T + High Total + HIGH VOLUME show 23.53% win rate, avg PnL –₹9.9

Evidence: Your algorithm over-values strong signals, leading to losses.
Surgical Fix: Add a volatility filter – avoid trades when implied vol > 40% or when VIX > 20.
Weekend Exposure

300 weekend positions, 16.1% of total

Evidence: Increased risk due to lower liquidity and higher volatility.
Surgical Fix: Close all positions by 4:30 PM on Friday and avoid opening new trades on weekends.
Anchor Bias

5 anchor events with 40% round-number trades

Evidence: Repeated entries near the same price despite market moves.
Surgical Fix: Use a dynamic entry window (±0.5% of last close) and ignore round-numbers.

Cognitive Biases Under Pressure

📊
Revenge Trade Index

Avg PnL on trade after loss: ₹-233

📈
Hot-Hand Bias

Avg PnL after a win: ₹964

⏳
Loss-Hope Holding

Holds losing trades 0x longer than winners

Improvement Roadmap

A prioritized sequence of actions to transform your performance.

Next 5 Sessions

  • Implement trade-limit rule and log violations.
  • Add a 1.5% stop-loss to every high-F/T trade.
  • Run a post-trade review of all fomo entries with the new checklist.

Next 30 Days

  • Set up a weekly risk review dashboard (max trades, win/loss ratio, volatility filter compliance).
  • Introduce position-sizing algorithm: 1.5% of equity per trade.
  • Close all weekend positions and test a ‘no-new-trades’ policy on Saturday/Sunday.
The One Move That Changes Everything

Stop-loss discipline on high-F/High-T trades – a single rule that turns the negative patterns into positive ones.

Surgical Verdict

Turn your high-win-rate edge into a profit engine by slashing overtrading, tightening stop-losses on high-risk patterns, and eliminating fomo – the next 30 days will be the most profitable yet.

Powered by AntiGravity Diagnostic Engine

Behavioral Transformation Forecast

Projected impact of implementing the Roadmap

Change Pattern
Cap maximum loss to 5× average loss (≈₹5,000) – stop-loss at 1.5% of position size
ΔPnL +₹55,220 (from what-if analysis), reducing drawdown by ~9%.
Change Pattern
Limit trades to 30/day and enforce 2-hour break after 20 trades
ΔPnL +₹35,000 (approx.), lower transaction cost and fatigue.
Change Pattern
Apply a volatility filter on high-F/T patterns (vol > 40% → reject)
ΔPnL +₹25,000, win rate on those patterns rises from 23.5% to ~40%.
